name: White Castle Vidalia Dip
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients except buns and crackers.
2. Transfer the mixture to a casserole dish.
3. Bake at 350°F for 30-35 minutes.
4. Let stand for 10 minutes.
5. Toast open buns under the broiler until toasted.
6. Serve the dip on buns or crackers.
